top_headline: WARSH INHERITS FIRE / BEIJING UNLOCKS NVDA — PPI +6.0% Day 1; H200 China licensed
chapters: I · MACRO — Warsh confirmed 54-45 May 13; Day 1 inherits PPI +6.0% YoY (est +4.9%) — biggest since Dec 2022; PPI MoM +1.4% (est +0.5%); gasoline +15.6%; June FOMC 97% hold; Michigan Sentiment 48.2 (est 49.5); final reading 10am ET today
I · MACRO — CPI 3.8% + PPI 6.0% + PCE 4.5% = pipeline accelerating; Warsh 'QT-for-Cuts' framework; no Day 1 speech; first FOMC June 17; hike probability structural not tail-risk

II · AI TRADE — US Commerce approved H200 export licenses for ~10 Chinese firms (Alibaba/Tencent/ByteDance/JD.com + Lenovo/Foxconn); 75K chips/customer cap; Beijing directed pause on H200 purchases (State Council supply-chain review); no shipments yet; NVDA May 14 close ~$233; $5.7T market cap record

II · AI TRADE — AMAT record Q2 $7.91B (est $7.69B); EPS $2.86 vs $2.68; Q3 guide $8.95B; industry growth raised >30% CY2026 (from >20%); +8% AH May 14. CSCO +14% AH on AI infrastructure orders blowout; FY guidance raised. AMD PM $435.39 (-2.27%); MI-series excluded from China H200 approvals
III · EARNINGS — Gainers: CSCO +14% AH, AMAT +8% AH; Losers: DOCS -26.1% AH (Q4 miss + guidance), LWLG -17.4%; Calendar: HD Q1 May 19 ($41.5B est), NVDA Q1 FY2027 May 20 ($78.5B est +79%)

IV · GEOPOLITICS — Trump-Xi summit: 3-year strategic stability framework; Board of Trade $30B proposed; rare earths: China pauses export restrictions; NVDA H200 US-side licenses (see Ch. II); Xi Taiwan warning ('clashes and conflicts'); no sweeping deal
IV · GEOPOLITICS — Iran/Hormuz ceasefire 'massive life support'; talks stalled; IEA: undersupplied through October; 4M bbl/day Hormuz flow loss; Brent $106.89 +1.1%; 112-nation UN Hormuz resolution
V · TRACK RECORD — Issues 007-008 (May 11-12) 3-4 day review: NVDA +7.4% WIN / BRENT short -0.6% FLAT / NVDA +8.7% WIN; 2W/0L/1F avg +5.2%

tase_events.event: TA-35 watch: Trump-Xi summit stabilization framework positive for global trade risk-on; H200 China licenses reduce tech-war escalation risk; Brent $106.89 sustained = Israeli energy import cost pressure. Iran ceasefire stall = continued regional security premium for Israeli defense sector (Elbit/Rafael bid)

narrative_threads: Warsh inheritance complete: Day 1 Fed Chair receives CPI 3.8% + PPI 6.0% + PCE 4.5% + TNX 4.46% + Michigan 48.2 — worst inflation stack handed to a new Fed Chair since Volcker era; no rate cuts in 2026; hike probability structural

NVDA Beijing binary — half-resolved: Washington approved H200 exports; Beijing blocked purchases pending State Council review. The China revenue wildcard ($50B estimated market per Huang) is now a May 20 earnings guidance catalyst — bulls need NVDA management to signal when Beijing approvals materialize

Hormuz / Iran — structural stalemate: Ceasefire 'massive life support'; both sides trading fire; IEA undersupplied through October; Brent stays above $100 until deal closes; Warsh's inflation problem gets worse each week of stalemate

AMAT / CSCO equipment cycle: Raising industry growth to >30% CY2026 is a structural AI capex confirmation. Sets an extremely high bar before NVDA May 20 — if NVDA misses, the discrepancy between equipment demand and end-chip demand creates narrative confusion

Trump-Xi: Stabilization, not transformation: 3-year framework preserves managed competition. Rare earth pause + H200 licenses = targeted wins. No sweeping tariff cut; Taiwan risk re-surfaced. AI chips remain the primary bilateral friction point
